items.title: I was so inspired reading all the DMs on how folks here use ChatGPT Work.
items.title_zh: 阅读所有关于这里的人们如何使用 ChatGPT Work 的私信，我深受启发。
items.description: I was so inspired reading all the DMs on how folks here use ChatGPT Work. Let’s try something else that will make the team smile. What’s a time you saw ChatGPT have a deeply positive impact on your or someone’s life?
items.description_zh: 阅读所有关于这里的人们如何使用 ChatGPT Work 的私信，我深受启发。让我们尝试一些其他能让团队微笑的事情。您在什么时候看到 ChatGPT 对您或某人的生活产生了深刻的积极影响？

items.title: It turns out that I still have this issue
items.description: It turns out that I still have this issue - at 100K+ YT subs and haven't been paid a single dollar by Google Adsense. The customer support is truly bad. Have to work my Google connections elsewhere... https://t.co/QtfhYdA2h7 https://t.co/g…
items.description_zh: 事实证明，我仍然遇到这个问题 - 在 10 万+ YT 订阅者中，Google Adsense 还没有向我支付一美元。客户支持确实很糟糕。必须在其他地方工作我的谷歌连接... https://t.co/QtfhYdA2h7 https://t.co/g...

items.title: I love using Claude Cowork to manage my calendar.
items.title_zh: 我喜欢使用 Claude Cowork 来管理我的日历。
items.description: I love using Claude Cowork to manage my calendar. Here's my prompt for it: Manage my calendar for the week. Requirements: 1. <20 hours of meetings 2. Dedupe conflicting meetings. Look at past weeks to see what kinds of meetings I decline.…
items.description_zh: 我喜欢使用 Claude Cowork 来管理我的日历。这是我的提示：管理我本周的日历。要求： 1. 会议时间<20 小时 2. 消除冲突会议的重复数据。看看过去几周我拒绝了哪些类型的会议。

items.title: Consumers spend money on food, rent, and entertainment, phone & internet, and shoppin…
items.title_zh: 消费者将钱花在食品、租金、娱乐、电话和互联网以及购物上……
items.description: Consumers spend money on food, rent, and entertainment, phone & internet, and shopping. Software is typically bought by their companies. Which is why outside of Netflix, Spotify, etc it’s hard to think of *huge* consumer subscription b…
items.description_zh: 消费者花钱在食品、租金、娱乐、电话和互联网以及购物上。软件通常由他们的公司购买。这就是为什么除了 Netflix、Spotify 等之外，很难想象有“巨大的”消费者订阅……

items.title: Thankful to 🇦🇷 Argentina for once again giving it all.
items.title_zh: 感谢🇦🇷阿根廷再次付出一切。
items.description: Thankful to 🇦🇷 Argentina for once again giving it all. Grit, passion, talent, faith. To Messi for proving he’s the best ever. And to America 🇺🇸 for hosting such a wonderful event. Enhorabuena tíos 🇪🇸!
items.description_zh: 感谢🇦🇷阿根廷再次付出一切。毅力、激情、才华、信念。感谢梅西证明了他是有史以来最好的。感谢美国🇺🇸举办了如此精彩的活动。恩霍拉布埃纳蒂奥斯🇪🇸！

items.title: Incidentally, I’m very bullish on cybersecurity as one of the best benchmarks for superin…
items.title_zh: 顺便说一句，我非常看好网络安全，将其视为超级安全的最佳基准之一……
items.description: Incidentally, I’m very bullish on cybersecurity as one of the best benchmarks for superintelligence. The “IQ test” of software engineering. The best engineers I’ve worked with in my career have usually had a deep background or interest in…
items.description_zh: 顺便说一句，我非常看好网络安全作为超级智能的最佳基准之一。软件工程的“智商测试”。在我的职业生涯中，与我共事过的最优秀的工程师通常对……有着深厚的背景或兴趣。
